message:
🐛 Fix scroll: synthetic re-dispatch with 200ms throttle (#162)

scrollLines() does not work with tmux alternate screen - no xterm.js
scrollback buffer. Switch to synthetic WheelEvent re-dispatch with:
- 200ms throttle (5 events/sec max) to prevent momentum
- deltaY normalized to +/-3 (direction only, no magnitude)
- suppressScroll flag during font changes
- 8 scroll tests covering direction, throttling, isolation

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
